conservative.name: Curtain of Flame
conservative.requirements: 10 power. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You conjure the curtain; both endpoints must be within close range
You conjure the curtain; both endpoints must be within medium range
You conjure the curtain; both endpoints must be within long range

sigmarsComet.description: You may freely see through and pass through your curtain at no penalty

challenge.description: Effect: You conjure a curtain of flames and smoke that is roughly ten feet tall and "hangs" in a straight line between you and any two points as described below. The curtain effectively blocks line of sight and adds at least to any checks that target anything on the far side. Any creature that passed through the curtain suffers wounds equal to your character rank. This curtain won't set fire to the floor or any walls that it is "anchored" to, but otherwise any combustible materials nearby may ignite

success.description: You conjure the curtain; both endpoints must be within close range
You conjure the curtain; both endpoints must be within medium range

boon.description: Each time an enemy suffers 1 or more wounds from this spell, roll . On a result, one of those wounds is critical
